log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Locathah — Winged Striker (distant).
--- Locathah — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:8+3=11 vs DC 16] FAIL! 8 psychic damage. HP: 130/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Locathah — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 30 damage. Locathah — Winged Striker HP: 37/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Locathah — Winged Striker.
REASONING: No concentration active. 3 enemies. Recasting Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Locathah — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
